title: astragalus onobrychis f. microphyllus
intro: Astragalus onobrychis f. microphyllus, also known as microphyllus astragalus, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, often used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which help to protect against stress, infections, and diseases. Astragalus onobrychis f. microphyllus has been traditionally used to support respiratory health, improve cardiovascular function, and enhance overall well-being. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and vitality.
